explore.noCraftsDescription: There are no public crafts available at the moment. Check back soon to discover amazing handmade creations!

about.title: About SustainableCrafting
about.missionDescription: At SustainableCrafting, our mission is to empower artisans worldwide by providing a platform that connects them directly with customers. We believe in preserving traditional crafts while promoting sustainability and authenticity in the global marketplace.
about.keyFeatures: The database includes a Prisma wired to Postgres via env-driven URLs for dev and Docker. UI includes the shadcn/ui with Tailwind v3, radix primitives, and reusable utilities. All packaged in a Docker container for easy deployment.

hero.title: Sustainable Crafting
hero.description: Connect directly with skilled artisans from across the world. Every skillfully designed product tells an authentic story about the place, its histories, and the people who create them. Verify their authenticity through our innovative QR code system.

direct.title: Connected
direct.description: Direct link to artisans and makers

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.description: Artisans across the world have the means to communicate with customers through a few simple steps:

upload.title: 1. Record
upload.description: Artisans document their work with our mobile app during the crafting process.

generate.title: 2. Generate QR
generate.description: The system creates a unique signature linking to artisan profile and creation process.

scan.title: 3. Scan & Verify
scan.description: Customers scan QR code to verify authenticity and learn the ptoduct's stor.y

trust.title: 4. Global Access
trust.description: Audiences learn about the processes and stories of artisans worldwide.

technology.title: Bridging Tradition with Technology
technology.description: Our QR code system creates an unbreakable link between handmade crafts and their creators. Each scan reveals the artisan's story, the materials used, and the traditional techniques that make every piece unique and valuable.

benefits.certificates: Immutable digital certificates for each craft
benefits.connection: Direct connection between artisans and customers
benefits.transparency: Transparent supply chain from creation to sale

footer.description: The project website has been produced and is managed by the University of Brighton. This project is funded by the UK's Arts and Humanities Research Council under the India-UK research into creative industries and cultural heritage with the title: Crafting a Sustainable Future: Empowering Indian Crafts in the Creative Industries”,(Grant No. OPP080).

verifiableCredential.title: Verifiable Credential
verifiableCredential.description: This craft has a W3C Verifiable Credential that proves its authenticity and provenance.
